season_weather: 真夏。猛暑。夏祭り・花火大会シーズン。半袖・ワンピース・サンダル
casual_outfit: Soft pastel tank top, flowy cream midi skirt, light denim jacket, white slip-on sandals, minimal gold accessories.
room_wear: pastel yellow cropped zip-up hoodie and matching wide-leg shorts set
pajamas: light cotton pajama set in pale pink gingham-check pattern
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: pillow slightly off-center, bed casually made
room_seasonal: a small electric fan on the shelf, an iced drink sweating on the desk, a wind chime

afternoon.label: ゼミ
afternoon.scene: university seminar room, relief and tiredness after the presentation
afternoon.story_scene: campus hallway after seminar presentation, relieved expression, notebook under arm

evening.label: カフェ巡り
evening.scene: exploring a cozy new Tokyo cafe, latte art and warm interior

story_slots.label: 朝
story_slots.scene_hint: 木曜日の朝 — ゼミに向けて準備中

face_conceal: Lying in bed: white fluffy duvet pulled up to the nose — only half-open tired eyes and disheveled bangs peek out above the blanket edge. Warm ambient lamp light.
